title: Kaathirunthaai Anbe Lyrics Naveena Saraswathi Sabatham Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Kaathirunthaai Anbe
Singers: Chinmayi, Nivas, Abhay Jodhpurkar
Movie: Naveena Saraswathi Sabatham
Music: Prem Kumar
Lyrics: Vairamuthu

Kaathirunthaai Anbe
endhan kadhal neethaney.
oru latcham vinmeen mazhyaai poligiradhey.

Kaathirunthaai Anbe
endhan kadhal neethaney.
oru latcham vinmeen mazhyaai poligiradhey.

Un vizhiyaal anbe ennai
uruga seidhaaye
en seenik kanneer unmel vilugiradhey.

Kadalodu serum vaan mazhaithuli pol
un kannodu maniyaaga kalandhirupen.
udalodu otti sellum nizhalgalai pol
naan unnodu pinnodu thodarndhirupen.
Unnaale adinenjil, adi boogambam

Pookalai thirakudhu kaatru
pulangalai thirakudhu kadhal
mudindhadhum maraiyudhu oodal

Kadhal seivom,
orumurai malarvadhu kadhal.
iruvarum kalandhapin thaedal
mudhaladhu mudivadhu kadhal.

kadhal seivom
kathirundhaai anbae
naan poothirundhaen munbe (2)

Kaathirunthaai Anbe
endhan kadhal neethaney.
oru latcham vinmeen mazhyaai poligiradhey.

Ne solliya melliye sollil
en thalai sorgathai muttudhadi
nee sammadham solliya nodiyinil aandugal
mothamum aliyudhadi.

en aavalai vazhavaithaai
en aayulai neela vaithaai
ne idhayathai eduthulondai
un punnagai dhesathai parisalithaai.

Kadhalaney unnai thudikkavitten,
kangalai vaangikondu urangaviten.
en uyire, un anbu mei endru unardhuvitten.

adi penne un vazhiyellaam naan irundhaen
ini nee poginra vazhiyaaga naan irupen
Sammadhithen un anbil sangamathithaen
Unnaale adinenjil adi boogambam

Hey senguyile siruveyile
sittragaley I luv u.
hey porpadhamey, arpudhamey
soppanamey I luv u.

Kaathirunthaai Anbe
endhan kadhal neethaney.
oru latcham vinmeen mazhyaai poligiradhey.

Un vizhiyaal anbe ennai
uruga seidhaaye
en seenik kanneer unmel vilugiradhey.

Kadalodu serum vaan mazhaithuli pol
un kannodu maniyaaga kalandhirupen.
udalodu otti sellum nizhalgalai pol
naan unnodu pinnodu thodarndhirupen.

Pookalai thirakudhu kaatru
pulangalai thirakudhu kadhal
mudindhadhum maraiyudhu oodal

Kadhal seivom,
orumurai malarvadhu kadhal.
iruvarum kalandhapin thaedal
mudhaladhu mudivadhu kadhal.

kadhal seivom
kathirundhaai anbae
naan poothirundhaen munbe (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kaathirunthaai Anbe?

The song revolves around themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions of waiting and yearning for a beloved.

Who are the singers of this song?

Kaathirunthaai Anbe is sung by Abhay Jodhpurkar, Chinmayi, and Nivas.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics for Kaathirunthaai Anbe were penned by the renowned lyricist Vairamuthu.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Naveena Saraswathi Sabatham, the song expresses the deep emotions of love and anticipation between the lead characters.

When was the song released?

The song was released in the year 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kaathirunthaai Anbe from the movie Naveena Saraswathi Sabatham is a romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by Abhay Jodhpurkar, Chinmayi, and Nivas, the song's soothing composition by Prem Kumar and poetic lyrics by Vairamuthu create an emotional experience. It conveys the feelings of anticipation and yearning, making it perfect for moments of reflection and romance. The song's gentle melody and heartfelt words evoke a sense of nostalgia and deep affection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kaathirunthaai Anbe from the movie Naveena Saraswathi Sabatham. This romantic duet, brought to life by the soulful voices of Abhay Jodhpurkar, Chinmayi, and Nivas, is beautifully penned by Vairamuthu and composed by Prem Kumar. Let the soothing tunes and heartfelt lyrics transport you to a world of love and longing.
stanzaMeanings: You waited, my love, you are my love. Like a shower of a million stars, you shine.
You waited, my love, you are my love. Like a shower of a million stars, you shine.
With your eyes, my love, you melted me. My salty tears fall on you.
Like raindrops joining the sea, I will blend with your eyes like a gem. Like shadows that stick to the body, I will follow you closely.
Because of you, my heart shakes like an earthquake.
The wind opens the flowers, the senses open up. When love ends, the quarrel disappears.
Let's love, love blooms once. After we unite, the search begins, and love ends.
Let's love, you waited, my love, I was blooming before.
You waited, my love, you are my love. Like a shower of a million stars, you shine.
In the gentle words you spoke, my head touches heaven. When you agreed, years disappeared in a moment.
You gave life to my longing, you made my life long. You took my heart and gave your smile as a gift.
Oh love, I couldn't stop thinking of you, I closed my eyes and slept. My life, I realized your love is true.
Oh girl, I was in your path, now I will be in the path you take. I agreed and joined in your love.
Because of you, my heart shakes like an earthquake.
Hey red parrot, little bird, little one, I love you. Hey golden one, wonderful one, dream, I love you.
You waited, my love, you are my love. Like a shower of a million stars, you shine.
With your eyes, my love, you melted me. My salty tears fall on you.
Like raindrops joining the sea, I will blend with your eyes like a gem. Like shadows that stick to the body, I will follow you closely.
The wind opens the flowers, the senses open up. When love ends, the quarrel disappears.
Let's love, love blooms once. After we unite, the search begins, and love ends.
Let's love, you waited, my love, I was blooming before.
